ab: ku papilangi mu muka i drenan an uninan.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: sadru a samekan i drenan kema i nanalli.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: ku papilangi mu muka i uma an uninan.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: auka ta penitawa?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: auka ta isuwa an uninan?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: tu papillangi ta kana sinsi muka i kabalawasan.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: auka ta isuwa an uninan?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: tu papillangi ta kana sinsi muka i drenan.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: auka ta i kabalawasan an uninan?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: adri, tu papillangi ta kana sinsi muka i drenan.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: auka ta i drenan an uninan?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: adri, auka ta i uma an uninan.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, auka ta i kabalawasan menauwa dra manay?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼？
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: auka ta menauwa dra tiballball.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, auka ta i drenan menauwa dra manay?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼？
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: auka ta menauwa dra aribangllangllawan.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: auka ta kemudaya i uma?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: auka ta menauwa drata sinaleman na kadumu. taranapaw! ullaya a iyabureng, a gerger a!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷！
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sinsi, auka ta i kabalawasan mellanguya?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎？
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: adri, auka ta menauwa dra tiballball.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, auka ta i uma semalema dra kulang?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎？
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: auka ta i uma penitawa an uninan.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: ullaya a tiballball a balriibiiyan kadriyu.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: amau ku driya nanau dra baabaaw dra tiballball a uninan.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: ullaya a aribangllangllawan a balriibiiyan kadriyu.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: yē! iuwa a! sagar ku dra aribangllangllawan. salaw bulay!
ch: B:耶！哇！我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮！
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: ullaya a aribangllangllawan a balriibiiyan kadriyu.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: amelli a aribangllangllawan idru. a gerger idru.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: kadru kadri menaunau. adri uwadawill!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷！
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: aiwa, adri mi auka i dawill.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: adri kababekas! patawar kemakawang ane malladu yu!
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maranger ku palamu menau.
en: I want to see them right away.
